meaning: n.[总称]白色陶瓷(器),卫生陶瓷(器)(如抽水马桶、 餐具和绝缘陶瓷)
examples: If there's any other whiteware that you need, like a dishwasher, for example. There are plenty of stores here that'll arrange delivery on the same day as purchase.
Selected high-effective whitening elements of Argan oil and zymosan can improve dark and uneven skin color, making your skin as white as ceramic whiteware.
